raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Senator Anna M. Caballero has argued that internet access and affordability should be reclassified as an essential service as vital as water or energy.",
    "The COVID pandemic validated the view that internet access is an essential component of 21st Century life.",
    "The legislation allocates $6 billion in investment to expand broadband infrastructure.",
    "$3.25 billion is allocated to build, operate and maintain an open access, state-owned middle mile network.",
    "$2 billion is set aside to establish last-mile broadband connections that will connect homes and businesses with local networks.",
    "$750 million is designated for a loan loss reserve fund to help local governments and nonprofits secure financing for broadband infrastructure.",
    "The legislation includes the creation of a broadband czar position at the California Department of Technology."
  ]
}
```
